title: Minneapolis Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Minneapolis, with a Z-Score of -3.34. This event has been classified as CRITICAL with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Minneapolis are extremely cold, with a Heating Degree Days (HDD) value of 12.7 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 61%, and the wind speed is approximately 4.0 km/h. 
 The absence of Cooling Degree Days (CDD) indicates that the city is experiencing a prolonged period of cold weather.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
